content.full_text:
January 23, 2006

LeeAnn McFaddin
Marylou Powers
Planning Commissioners
City of Galt
913 Scarletwood Court
Galt, CA 95632

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-245

Dear Commissioners McFaddin and Powers:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice. As we discussed in several telephone calls, the facts presented in the letter requesting advice may no longer be accurate. Commissioner Powers has asked to be withdrawn from this request for advice and has issued a new request.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Adrianne Korchmaros
Political Reform Consultant
